titleDescription:
Please allow me to introduce myself! I am Patty Durell, a leader, educator, motivator, people connector, wife to an amazing husband, daughter, and the mom of the best cat ever! I have a passion for empowering and challenging people to be their best and has been doing so for over 25 years.
 Through my younger years I battled depression, addiction, and being overweight. I am a completely different person now!
 In my mid-twenties I learned that if I was willing to fail but didnâ€™t give up, I was capable of accomplishing things that seemed impossible. I learned this through a strength training program called High Intensity Training (HIT). Within a few months of starting HIT, I completely altered my body composition, losing 30 pounds, and has maintained it ever since. I was so empowered by my new-found feelings of confidence, positive self-image, and sense of purpose that I wanted to share it with everyone, especially those challenged by a lack of self-esteem.
 My passion started as a Physical Therapist Assistant (PTA), helping people overcome life changing orthopedic and neurological events. During this time, my husband and I started a personal training business to help discharged physical therapy patients. Our training business expanded to include people of all ages and stages of life, from those who had never exercised to professional athletes and eventually outgrew other peopleâ€™s gyms. I opened Rock Solid Fitness in 2012, a relationship based, personal fitness coaching and consulting studio.
 While overcoming a tremendous fear that was holding me back, public speaking, I learned I was good at it and it has become a new passion. I love speaking about Building a Successful Company, Leadership, Exercise Science, and Self Care. I have been a speaker at many local and national events and conferences.
 I also love to serve the community, connecting people to businesses and supporting local community charities.

 To help physicians rewrite their narrative, I draw on more than two decades of experience:
 - Storytelling: Twenty-five years as a sports journalist gives me the judgment, integrity and skill to convey complex medical topics with compassion, clarity and impact.

title: Owner of KAREN DECKER FITNESS & Certified Personal Trainer
summary: Our goal at Karen Decker Fitness, whether you utilize Personal Training or Group Fitness Classes, is for each individual to know they are valued and their personal fitness goals are at the forefront of each visit. Staying motivated and enjoying your sessions in a fun supportive environment, while also improving your technical skills and meeting your health and wellness needs, is the reputation our gym has earned and maintained for 5 years in our small island community.
titleDescription:
In my 4th year as the primary primary fitness instructor in our island community of Port Aransas we were devastated by a direct hit form Cat 4 Hurricane Harvey. City facilities were destroyed, tourism-the energy source for our economy-ceased on August 25, 2018. We have yet to regain the momentum we had and it will be many years of rebuilding as almost all businesses were damaged or destroyed, including lodging for both tourists and residents. 95 % of all housing structures were damaged. 
 The hurricane left in its wake not only the aforementioned devastation, but a community staggering and in need of the wellness benefits that physical fitness affords. With no city facility left and no resources in their budget when it was now essential to provide for immediate dire needs, such as emergency vehicles and first-responder facilities, it became evident that our townspeople needed a place to gather and 'sweat the stress off.' After initially meeting in a vacant parking lot and then teaching for free in a facility that sustained relatively little damage, the benevolence of a local family, owners of Christensen Construction, offered their warehouse for a gym facility. Our little town is slowly regaining their equilibrium and fitness has been an important aspect to their personal restoration. 
 Karen Decker Fitness offers fitness classes and weight lifting/exercise equipment options as well a place to gather and enjoy the aspects of both the encouragement of group fitness sessions and the benefits gained through consistent, positive instruction and health mending nutritional recommendations.

titleDescription:
I have made it my personal mission in life to make at least one person smile every day. Through my lens, it is my goal to take that one special moment in time, freeze it, and make it last forever. This will be my legacy!
 
 To say that photography is my passion is an extreme understatement. My many journeys, no matter how challenging or favorable, have made me aware of how it is the small things that matter in life. Holding on to those irreplaceable memories can make all the difference.
 
 Having the ability to capture what may be the last picture of a family together gives me peace. I know what it is like to have those moments slip away and become fleeting memories. Providing you with the opportunity to hold that last happy memory in a frame or on a canvas or simply in a wallet ignites my desire to capture the perfect image.
 
 I began taking pictures while I was an employee at an Elementary School. I captured the yearbook photos and assembled the yearbook for all to enjoy. Later, answering the call to serve my country, I volunteered to serve in the Army and was stationed in Hawaii. During unit functions, such as organizational days and family appreciation events, I photographed the festivities and published them to our unit Facebook page for Soldiers and their families to enjoy. Taking photos came naturally to me and I knew that I enjoyed doing it. It was then that I decided that I would pursue photography. After four years of service, I was honorably discharged from the military and I opened Phaedra W Photography, which later became an LLC.
 
 Those who know me will tell you that I am always willing to lend a hand, so please don't hesitate to ask me anything to help you along your way. It is my pleasure to serve you and preserve your memories for generations to come!
 
 Warmest Regards,
 Phaedra

summary:
As a small business owner and mother to four young boys, life is busy, fun, and full of unexpected surprises! In order to stay one step ahead, or at least keep up, I have learned the importance of taking care of myself and those around me. Nutrition and exercise are non-negotiable.  My journey to becoming a gym owner and fitness professional began when I was just a child. Growing up, I was always the "bigger" kid and was often teased and made to feel like I was not good enough. This led me to develop a bit of an inferiority complex, but it also fueled my drive to prove everyone wrong. I started lifting weights in my early teens and soon found myself addicted to the feeling of getting stronger. The more I lifted, the more confident I became, and I began seeing my body in a new light. I started to love the way I looked and felt, and I knew that I wanted to help other women feel the same way. 
 
 I earned my certification as a personal trainer and started working at a local gym. From then on, I decided to open my own gym, Strength and Fitness Palace. 
 
 Strength and Fitness Palace is a fitness center that specializes in helping people achieve their fitness goals. We offer a variety of services, including personal training, group fitness classes, and nutritional counseling. Our goal is to help people lead healthier lives by providing them with the necessary resources to achieve their fitniness goals. Strength and Fitness Palace has become the trusted resource for people looking to improve their health and fitness. We offer a safe and welcoming environment for people of all levels of fitness. Whether you are just starting your journey to better health or you are a seasoned athlete, Strength and Fitness Palace can help you achieve your goals. 
 The business has flourished, and we have been able to help countless women achieve their fitness goals. If you're looking for top-notch fitness professionals that can help you reach your goals, Strength and Fitness Palace is perfect for you. title: Mental Fitness Business Owner
summary:
Welcome! 
 
 My name is Stefanie, and I'm a mental fitness coach who helps individuals undersand, manage, and improve their mental health so they can live their best life!
 
 I have been passionate about mental health and wellness for most of my life now. Here's a little backstory on how my business was born:
 
 For years, I found myself struggling with one mental health issue after another. I felt stuck and often hopeless. It took a lot of hard work and dedication to heal my mind so I could begin living a life that I loved. After conquering my many mental health struggles, I decided to become a Mental Health Ambassador and went on to get my certifications in Counseling, Cognitive Behavioral Therapy, and Life Coaching.
 
 I became obsessed with mental fitness and dedicated to helping others who struggled with their mental health like I had. I wanted to be able to provide those in need with easily accessible mental health resources that they could use over and over again to support, improve, and manage their mental health on a daily basis.
 
 And that is how Flower Child Psyche was born.
 
 Created specifically for those who struggle with mental health, both the blog and the store is designed to offer a calming, peaceful vibe that also exudes lightness and hope. Each product is carefully crafted and curated to provide emotional support and promote mental wellness. Every blog post is heartfully written and packed full of invaluable information for managing mental health. 
 
 These resources will improve your mental health journey, provide the support you need, boost your mental fitness, help you get organized, and make time for self-care easy.
 
 Take just a couple of moments out of your day to focus on your needs and your mental fitness. A couple of moments a day can lead to a lifetime of change.
titleDescription: I created Flower Child Psyche so that I could help people who struggle with their mental health manage their everyday lives. titleDescription:
As the Gym Manager at Nashville Gymnastics Training Center, I oversee all the recreational classes and staff, as well as train incoming instructors. I have created & organized all rotations, curriculum & assessments, for all recreational and team-prep programs. My other responsibilities include leading monthly staff meetings & trainings, interviewing possible new coaches, and office work (class schedule & calendar; payment calendar; event calendar & handouts; marketing & promotional documents; NGTC Facebook & Instagram account & website creation & updates).
 I also serve as the competitive team director. Meaning, I work with compulsory coaches in writing and planning their workouts based on their particular kids and skill level, and coach majorly optional-level gymnast. I have personally been in charge of teaching instructors the 2013-2021 routines for levels 2-5, as well as coaching my compulsory gymnasts at least one day per week. As an Optional coach, I coach whichever event needed, but also serve as the head Vault coach for levels 6-10. I am big on water and proper nutrition, so before competition season, I give the parents a handout that explains general caloric expenditures based on the gymnasts weight and practice length. To give them some healthy snack ideas, I also include sample pre- & post-workout foods. 
 (Side Note: I am also an ACE Certified Personal Trainer and Youth Fitness Specialist, so I incorporate my knowledge gained there into every conditioning program). Therefore, I have written the conditioning regimen for all competitive gymnasts, as well as personal conditioning/ rehabilitating exercises for injured gymnasts. As a competitive team coach, I enjoy coaching every event. I would say that my favorite optional event is bars, and my favorite compulsory event is beam. 
 I am ready to learn everything there is about the sport of gymnastics (continuing ed. listed below). Please feel free to message me, & I will respond with some questions of my own :)

He is the creator of the RAWW Method, a hybrid training system that blends Olympic weightlifting, powerlifting, and bodybuilding principles.  What sets Tim apart as a coach is his ability to combine deep technical expertise with individualized programming and real-world experience. As the owner of a BODY20 fitness studio, my responsibilities include but not limited to:
 1. Business Operations: Managing day-to-day operations, ensuring the smooth functioning of the studio, and overseeing administrative tasks such as scheduling, billing, and payroll.
 2. Staff Management: Hiring, training, and supervising fitness trainers and support staff. Ensure that trainers are knowledgeable and capable of delivering high-quality training sessions.
 3. Customer Service: Focusing on providing excellent customer service to retain existing clients and attract new ones. This involves addressing client inquiries, concerns, and feedback promptly and professionally.

 5. Financial Management: Managing the financial aspects of the business, including budgeting, financial forecasting, and tracking revenue and expenses. Handle vendor relationships, negotiate contracts, and assess the financial performance of the studio.
 6. Studio Maintenance: Overseeing the cleanliness, maintenance, and safety of the facility. This involves coordinating repairs, ensuring equipment is in good working condition, and maintaining a welcoming environment for clients.
 7. Business Development: Identifying opportunities for growth and expansion, such as opening new locations or offering additional services. Conduct market research, analyze industry trends, and develop strategies to stay competitive in the fitness market.
 8. Compliance and Regulations: Staying up-to-date with relevant laws, regulations, and licensing requirements related to operating a fitness studio. Ensuring the studio adheres to health and safety guidelines is crucial.
